children.label: a Printed instructions; telecommunications devices for the deaf

children.text: instructions, printed in large type, conspicuously displayed at each permanent registration facility and each polling place; and

children.heading: Notice of availability of aids
children.label: c Notice of availability of aids
children.text: The chief election officer of each State shall provide public notice, calculated to reach elderly and handicapped voters, of the availability of aids under this section, assistance under , and the procedures for voting by absentee ballot, not later than general public notice of registration and voting is provided.section 10508 of this title
